payload.objective: Replace M16x8 dense-tile scaling with measured decode-shaped M1x8 area, timing, and result service, then recompute the Llama7B operational frontier.

decoder_contract.decode_score_tile_frontier_scope: Replace the M16x8 decode mismatch with measured M1x8 scalar and packed interfaces, then recompute stage service, subtile scheduling, HBM-share latency, area feasibility, and Pareto rank.

evaluation_record.title: Decode-shaped M1x8 score tile for the Llama7B attention frontier
evaluation_record.primary_question: How do scalar-drain and packed-row M1x8 score tiles change measured area, delay, and the precision-aligned Llama7B token frontier relative to the semantically mismatched M16x8 recost?
evaluation_record.expected_reason: The active Llama7B decision path must recompute stage service instead of scaling an M16 tile as if all rows were useful during M1 decode.
